value.reason: The cited page is explicitly titled "Claude Code in Slack" and documents this exact chat-surface integration capability. The page confirms users mention @Claude in Slack to delegate coding tasks, Claude Code runs asynchronously (creating sessions on the web), gathers context from threads, and surfaces results back in the channel — all matching the cell description. The label "Claude Code in Slack" is the provider's own name for the feature as shown in the page heading. The description's claims about @mention-driven task delegation, asynchronous execution, context gathering, and results returned in-channel are all directly supported by the page. This is distinct from remote control (mobile/web), notifications, or other access surfaces.
